nasb.text: Thus it came about on the third day, which was Pharaoh’s birthday, that he made a feast for all his servants; and he lifted up the head of the chief cupbearer and the head of the chief baker among his servants.

esv.text: On the third day, which was Pharaoh’s birthday, he made a feast for all his servants and lifted up the head of the chief cupbearer and the head of the chief baker among his servants.

cnv.text: 到了第三日，就是法老的生日，他為臣僕擺設筵席，在他們面前把酒政和膳長提出監來，

ccb.text: 第三天是法老的生日，他宴请文武百官，把侍酒总管和膳食总管从监牢里提出来，

csbs.text: 到了第三天，正是法老的生日，他为所有的臣仆摆设宴席，并在他们面前抬起了司酒长和司膳长的头。
